query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.stripeCustomerId, s.id as sub_id, s.status, s.planId, s.stripeSubscriptionId FROM users u LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.userId ORDER BY u.id;
